task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the bank record with the correct name, routing number, and SWIFT code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or list view in the application showing a bank record with Name 'Chase Bank NA' (or 'JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.'), Routing No '021000021', and Swift Code 'CHASUS33'.

task_completion.description: Verify the address details for the bank record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Address fields associated with the Chase Bank record showing '270 Park Avenue', City 'New York', and Zip/Postal Code '10017'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the bank account under the Chase Bank record with the correct name and account number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Bank Account' form or table showing Account Name 'Chase Payroll Operating' and Account No '8877665544', clearly linked to the Chase Bank record.

task_completion.description: Verify the bank account is set to 'Checking' type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown or field in the bank account record indicating the Account Type is 'Checking' (or 'C').

task_completion.description: Verify the bank account currency is set to USD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A field or dropdown in the bank account record showing 'USD' or 'US Dollar' as the selected currency.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the application's graphical user interface to create the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the iDempiere web application interface (menus, forms, tabs) being interacted with, rather than a terminal, database client, or API tool.

integrity.description: Ensure the records were actually saved in the system and not just typed into a text editor or mocked.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of system-generated UI elements like 'Saved successfully' messages, generated record IDs, or the records appearing in a search/list view within the application.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use direct SQL queries to insert the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows or database administration tools (like pgAdmin or psql) executing INSERT statements for the bank or account records.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in the iDempiere ERP system. The Bank Name should be 'Chase Bank NA' (or 'JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.'). The Routing Number is '021000021' and SWIFT code is 'CHASUS33'. The address is '270 Park Avenue, New York, 10017'. The Bank Account must be linked to this bank, with Account Name 'Chase Payroll Operating', Account Number '8877665544', Account Type 'Checking' (represented as 'C' in the system), and Currency 'USD'.
